data.title: dso-config.conf: orphan config variables present -> unused keys waste context and cause confusion
data.description:
## Incident Overview
The dso-config.conf file contains variables that are not referenced anywhere in the plugin codebase. These orphan variables waste context window space (the config file is loaded into every session), create confusion about what is actually configurable, and may mislead future developers who assume all keys are meaningful.

## Expected vs Observed
- **Expected**: Every key in dso-config.conf is used in at least one place in the plugin scripts, skills, hooks, or agents. Keys with no code references are removed or documented as reserved for future use.
- **Observed**: dso-config.conf contains keys that grep cannot find in any plugin file, indicating they are orphaned (never read or acted upon).

## Fix
Audit dso-config.conf against all .sh, .md, and .conf files in plugins/dso/. Remove any key whose name does not appear in at least one code file. If a key is intentionally reserved for future use, add a comment in the config file noting this.

## Affected Component
.claude/dso-config.conf and plugins/dso/scripts/read-config.sh — config key usage

## Notes
Reported by user during interactive session.
